zh: 滑块验证码改为后端校验滑动轨迹，会检查耗时、移动次数和距离变化。
拖动通过后由后端签发短期登录票据，登录页不再直接暴露滑块验证 token。
en: Slider captcha now validates movement traces on the backend, including duration, move count, and distance changes.
After verification, the backend issues a short-lived login ticket instead of exposing the slider token directly on the login page.
